marketing_seeds: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/day, delayed tracking updates cause late orders. We aggregate daily shipment tracking updates and send exception alerts instead of manual tracking and updates via email or spreadsheets.
Inability to track shipment exceptions in real-time, leading to delayed responses.
